My boss left work early, so I left early, too.
I went to Dunkin Donuts and drank some coffee.
I quit my job at a public accounting firm and found a new job in corporate with a great boss and coworkers.
My son called and invited me to lunch.
I wrote a poem I was really proud of.
I discovered a new streaming website.
My father has called me in the mornings to check on me.
Got paid a $170 bonus at work.
See my country manifest against a government that represses them
The depressive period that I've been in for the last 2-3 years has finally lifted to the extent that I'm able to meet my basic needs, and complete basic activities of daily living.
